section.heading: Construction

content.p: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to limit or otherwise affect the authority of any consensus standards organization to establish, modify, or withdraw any standards and specifications under any other law or authority.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 101–592, § 9, formerly § 12, Nov. 16, 1990, 104 Stat. 2952; renumbered § 9 and amended Pub. L. 106–34, § 9, June 8, 1999, 113 Stat. 123.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 9 of Pub. L. 101–592 was renumbered section 6 and is classified to section 5408 of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1999—Pub. L. 106–34 struck out “in effect on November 16, 1990” after “law or authority”.
